title: Nilamadhav Temple
tagline: Nilamadhav Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Sri Nilamadhava Temple (Odia: ନୀଳମାଧବଜିଉ ମନ୍ଦିର, କଣ୍ଟିଲୋ) is very old and famous Lord Vishnu temple which is near to the bank of Mahanadi, in Kantilo, Odisha, India.
overview.description: Sri Nilamadhava Temple (Odia: ନୀଳମାଧବଜିଉ ମନ୍ଦିର, କଣ୍ଟିଲୋ) is very old and famous Lord Vishnu temple which is near to the bank of Mahanadi, in Kantilo, Odisha, India. It is present near to the twin hills with a surrounding forest. A permanent flow of holy water from the feet of Lord Nilamadhava is another attraction of the spot. Lord Siddheswar is also present which is another highlight of the place.

topPlaces.name: Hindol State
topPlaces.description: Hindol State was one of the princely states of India during the British Raj belonging to Eastern Ganga dynasty. Its former territory is now part of Dhenkanal district.

topPlaces.name: Kantilo
topPlaces.description: Kantilo is a Village and Grama panchayat in Nayagarh district in the Indian state of Odisha. It is a holy place famous for "Lord Nilamadhab".

topPlaces.name: Pitamahul
topPlaces.description: Pitamahul is a gram panchayat of Birmaharajpur subdivision of Subarnapur district, Odisha, India. It is located on the bank of river Mahanadi and on the side of the road connecting Birmaharajpur and Rairakhol town.

topPlaces.name: Bhattarika Temple
topPlaces.description: Bhattarika Temple is located on the bank of Mahanadi River, at Sasanga village in the tehsil Baramba, (formerly Athgarh), Cuttack district, Odisha, India. It is dedicated to the Hindu Goddess Maa Bhattarika worshipped as a manifestation of Shakti.

topPlaces.name: Sidhamula
topPlaces.description: Sidhamula is a village in Nayagarh district. It is a Gram Panchayat under the Khandapara block.

topPlaces.name: Gokulananda Tourism Center
topPlaces.description: Gokulananda Tourism Center, also known as (Gokulananda picnic spot), is a tourism center situated in Sidhamula village, in Nayagarh, Odisha. People come here, to see the scenery of this spot and for picnic purposes, mainly between the months of October to March.

items.note: Hindol State was one of the princely states of India during the British Raj belonging to Eastern Ganga dynasty. Its former territory is now part of Dhenkanal district.
Kantilo is a Village and Grama panchayat in Nayagarh district in the Indian state of Odisha. It is a holy place famous for "Lord Nilamadhab".

Pitamahul is a gram panchayat of Birmaharajpur subdivision of Subarnapur district, Odisha, India. It is located on the bank of river Mahanadi and on the side of the road connecting Birmaharajpur and Rairakhol town.

Bhattarika Temple is located on the bank of Mahanadi River, at Sasanga village in the tehsil Baramba, (formerly Athgarh), Cuttack district, Odisha, India. It is dedicated to the Hindu Goddess Maa Bhattarika worshipped as a manifestation of Shakti.
Sidhamula is a village in Nayagarh district. It is a Gram Panchayat under the Khandapara block.

Gokulananda Tourism Center, also known as (Gokulananda picnic spot), is a tourism center situated in Sidhamula village, in Nayagarh, Odisha. People come here, to see the scenery of this spot and for picnic purposes, mainly between the months of October to March.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Nilamadhav Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Nilamadhav Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Nilamadhav Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (66 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (68 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Nilamadhav Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Nilamadhav Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Nilamadhav Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Nilamadhav Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Nilamadhav Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Hindol State, Kantilo, Pitamahul, Bhattarika Temple, Sidhamula.
